name: Clickhouse
philosophy: A high-performance database interface anchored on near-pure black canvas with electric yellow as the brand voltage.
trademark_signals: Near-pure black canvas (#0a0a0a) with white type. The system has no light-mode marketing surface
Electric yellow primary (#faff69). Used on primary CTAs, large stat-callout numbers ("2.8k+", "74k+"), and full-bleed yellow CTA bands
Inter at weight 700 for display, weight 600 for sub-titles + buttons, weight 400 for body. No serif counterpoint
Dark surface cards (#1a1a1a) for feature cards, code windows, and product mockups. Cards barely lighter than canvas — color-block contrast is subtle
Code blocks render in JetBrains Mono inside. SQL syntax-highlighted in muted blues / yellows / grays
ai_slop_avoided: introduce a second brand color. ClickHouse is monochromatic + yellow
bold display weight beyond 700 or use weight 500 for headlines. The hierarchy depends on size, not on weight gradation
use yellow for body text or large surface fills outside of intentional yellow cards
